verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can see You through all of nature I can see You in the sky I can see Your creation You are God the mighty one

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be Your name forever Blessed be Your name Oh Lord You created me dear Father And you saved me through Your power Blessed be your name oh Lord, For You are God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord of lords the One who saved me You are God I worship You You are Lord of all creation You are God for all the nations
